title: SAP OData pagination not configured
symptom: The workflow only retrieves 20 items from SAP instead of all available items due to pagination not being set up correctly.
applies_when: HTTP Request node configured to fetch data
not_this_if: Only a single page of data is needed
root_cause: The SAP OData API response includes a next link for pagination, but the HTTP Request node was not configured to follow this link, resulting in only the first page of results being returned.
fix_steps: In the HTTP Request node, go to Options > Pagination.
Set Pagination Mode to 'Response Contains Next URL'.
Adjust your Code node to process all input items instead of a single response.
agent_instruction: Configure the HTTP Request node for pagination and adjust the Code node to handle combined output.
